homepage.title: Anna McMorrin MP
homepage.meta_description: Anna McMorrin is the Welsh Labour Member of Parliament for Cardiff North, representing Gabalfa, Heath, Lisvane, Llandaff North, Llanishen, Pontprennau, Old St Mellons, Rhiwbina, Taff
headings: h2: Working Hard for Cardiff North
homepage.text_excerpt: Anna McMorrin MP 0 Skip to Content Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Working Hard for Cardiff North As your Member of Parliament for Cardiff North, I’m here to serve you. I can help with issues that involve the UK Government, including the Home Office and Department for Work and Pensions. I hold regular advice surgeries , where I can give you advice on personal issues, and coffee mornings which are more informal group discussions. If you live in Cardiff North, please click here to register your interest in joining my next event. Strict parliamentary protocol means I can only help constituents of Cardiff North. See if you are in Cardiff North by checking the list of areas below. Promoted by Anna McMorrin at 17 Plasnewydd, CF14 1NR.

pages.title: Anna McMorrin MP — Campaigns
pages.text_excerpt: Anna McMorrin MP — Campaigns 0 Skip to Content Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Campaigns Cost of living My number one priority is cutting the cost of living for people in Cardiff North. Click here to find out more. Environment I have always been an environmental campaigner. Now, I’m working as part of a UK Labour Government, investing in renewable energy and protecting our environment in Wales. Click here to find out more. Girls in Sport There are too many obstacles to women and girls in sport. We need better facilities, education and training. Click here to find out more. Jobs and Growth Two Labour governments are investing in opportunities like AI and renewable energy, creating jobs and economic growth in Wales. Click here to find out more. Next Stop My “Next Stop” public transport campaign has secured some major wins on the Coryton Line. Now, I’m calling for a more regular service of four trains per hour. Click here to find out more. Safer Streets The first duty of any government is to keep people safe. Click here to find out more. Promoted by Anna McMorrin at 17 Plasnewydd, CF14 1NR.

pages.title: Anna McMorrin MP — Contact
pages.text_excerpt: Anna McMorrin MP — Contact 0 Skip to Content Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Contact Me Alternatively, you can click this link and enter your postcode in the box provided. If you are not a constituent of Cardiff North, you can use this to find your Member of Parliament and their contact details. If you are a constituent of Cardiff North, you can contact me by emailing: anna.mcmorrin.mp@parliament.uk or calling our constituency office: 02920 624 440 Please include your full name, home address and phone number so we can log your case in our system and get back to you as soon as possible. Due to strict parliamentary protocol, my office can only handle casework from constituents in Cardiff North. See if you are in Cardiff North by checking the list of areas below. Promoted by Anna McMorrin at 17 Plasnewydd, CF14 1NR.

pages.title: Anna McMorrin MP — Meet Me
pages.text_excerpt: Anna McMorrin MP — Meet Me 0 Skip to Content Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Meet Me I hold regular events across Cardiff North, where constituents can tell me about any issues or concerns they may have. Advice surgeries, where I can give you advice on personal issues Coffee mornings which are more informal group discussions If you would like to attend my next surgery or coffee morning, please fill out the form at the bottom of this page. Promoted by Anna McMorrin at 17 Plasnewydd, CF14 1NR.
